contract.name: v2/search/spending_by_award.md
contract.description: Search and paginate award-level spending records using filter criteria.

filters.description: Search filter object aligned with shared search filter contract.
filters.constraints: Required; must include award_type_codes and any additional search filters needed to bound the result set.

fields.constraints: Required non-empty array of field names.

page.constraints: Optional; default server behavior applies if omitted.

results.description: Award-level rows matching filters. Observed rows can include helper identifiers such as `generated_internal_id` and `internal_id` in addition to requested field-label columns.

page_metadata.description: Pagination metadata for the current result set.

quirks: Field names are API-defined labels rather than always being snake_case keys.
Observed search rows may include `generated_internal_id`, which is the safer follow-up identifier for `/api/v2/awards/{award_id}/` than the display field `Award ID`.
Helper columns other than `generated_internal_id` are opportunistic and may be absent across otherwise valid queries, so they should not be treated as stable joins without local verification.
Filter behavior can evolve with upstream search index updates.
risks: Large result sets can be expensive; always use bounded pagination.
Query semantics depend on shared filter schema version alignment.
gaps: Some sort-field compatibility combinations are not exhaustively enumerated in this fixture.

probes.notes: Validated expected POST request envelope and paginated response shape.

gaps: Exact field catalog should be refreshed with upstream data dictionary releases.
risks: Filter semantics can change across API releases and should be regression-tested.
